# delegate

**Instance Property**

The object that acts as the delegate of the device browser.

## Declaration

```swift
unowned(unsafe) var delegate: (any ICDeviceBrowserDelegate)? { get set }
```

## Managing Device Browsing

- **ICDeviceBrowserDelegate**: Methods for managing the addition and removal of devices and responding to device changes.
